item.title: Google Capital Bets Big on CrowdStrike to Accelerate Hyper-growth - crowdstrike.com
item.description: It was almost four years ago that I co-founded CrowdStrike with intention of creating a security company that would shake up the industry. Learn more now!

item.title: Falcon Zero-Day Flash Detection
item.description: In the wake of the Hacking Team leaks in early July, a result of an intrusion into the company’s network. Learn more about the intrusion today!

item.title: Brian Kelly, CSO of Rackspace, Shares Why He Chose CrowdStrike - crowdstrike.com
item.description: When you're in charge of protecting your company's and customers critical business information, there's no option for a security breach.

item.title: U.S. - China Cyber Agreement: Trust, but Verify - crowdstrike.com
item.description: For many years the security industry has been advocating for an agreement between 2 superpowers, do we finally have it? Read more on the CrowdStrike blog.

item.title: Blurring of Commodity and Targeted Attack Malware
item.description: As malware and its authors continue to evolve, deciphering the purpose of specific malware-driven attacks has become more challenging. Learn more now!

item.title: Sakula Malware: What Is the INOCNATION Campaign? – CrowdStrike
item.description: Read up on the third Sakula malware variant, how it was assessed, and how it was determined if there was a connection between the “French Aerospace” campaign, the “Ironman” campaign, and the "INOCNATION" campaign.

item.title: Nothing else is working. Why not memory forensics? - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Why memory forensics isn't the tool for central security & where it does belong. Click to learn more from the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Top 5 Cybersecurity Mistakes Companies Make and How to Avoid Them
item.description: Click to read the top five cybersecurity mistakes companies make and how to avoid them with these solutions on the CrowdStike blog here.

item.title: “You Want Me to Do What?” A Guide to Interpreting Cybersecurity Recommendations
item.description: Important information for you and your team that will help you identify the security gaps to help keep your company safe. Learn how to get protected today!

item.title: New Protection Capability of Falcon for Mac
item.description: A powerful solution to prevent threats? Read about CrowdStrike's new protection capability of Falcon for Mac here!

item.title: What Sets Falcon Apart: Intelligent Host Sensors
item.description: Learn what sets CrowdStrike's Falcon apart from other endpoint security competition with its intelligent host sensors & more here on our blog.

item.title: The Importance of Logging - CrowdStrike
item.description: Across the targeted attacks, thefts & criminal enterprises that CrowdStrike has investigated, one thing is clear: logging is extremely important, click here to learn more!

item.title: More Than Just Your eSignature: The Analysis - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Part two of CrowdStrike's investigation for a client operating in the healthcare sector on a phishing scam targeting cloud email providers, click to read!

item.title: The Security Roadmap – Planning for Job Security - crowdstrike.com
item.description: A common weakness we observe in organizations is the misuse of technology that has already been purchased, learn more on the CrowdStrike blog.

item.title: 4.0 Another Brick In The CryptoWall - crowdstrike.com
item.description: CrowdStrike will characterize the CryptoWall threat using the kill chain & outline practical approaches for disrupting it. See what's new with version 4.0!

item.title: The Prevention Continuum: Preventing Silent Failure
item.description: CrowdStrike has a variety of customers, with each company being unique, one thing is always constant: at some point they had a breach, click to learn more!

item.title: DEEP PANDA Uses Sakula Malware to Target Organizations
item.description: Learn how the CrowdStrike Intelligence team discovered the use of Sakula Malware that targeted organizations in multiple sectors. Find out more here!

item.title: Sheep Year Kernel Heap Fengshui: Spraying in the Big Kids’ Pool - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Learn about the state of kernel exploitation on the CrowdStrike blog, bringing you up-to-date news in the cyber security world!

item.title: Cyber Kung-Fu: The Great Firewall Art of DNS Poisoning - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Wing Chun, the first Chinese martial art learned by the legendary Bruce Lee, is often best known for its principles of attack and defense. Read more today!

item.title: Parsing Sysmon Events for IR Indicators - crowdstrike.com
item.description: A dedicated endpoint-monitoring tool is quickly becoming a necessity for organizations to combat attacks. Learn more on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Surgeon with a Shotgun! - Memory Forensics - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Read up on two great tools that make processing memory evidence fast & effective over the tedious manual analysis method on the CrowdStrike blog here!

item.title: Chopping packets: Decoding China Chopper Web shell traffic over SSL - crowdstrike.com
item.description: The Chopper Web shell is a widely used backdoor by Chinese and other malicious actors to remotely access a compromised Web server. Learn all about it!

item.title: Adversaries Set Their Sights on Oil and Gas Sector - crowdstrike.com
item.description: With high profile breaches in the financial, healthcare and retail sectors making news almost daily. Learn more about the gas and oil sectors impact.

item.title: Operational threat intelligence with Maltego Transform Hub - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Learn about operational threat intelligence with Maltego Transform Hub & more cybersecurity information from the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: RSA 2015 Hacking Exposed: CrowdResponse Update Released - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Learn about the CrowdResponse update with the new @mal module released after the RSA 2015 Hacking Exposed session on the CrowdStrike blog.

item.title: 3 Tips for Operationalizing Cyber Intelligence - crowdstrike.com
item.description: One of the biggest challenges organizations face today is operationalizing intelligence and incorporating it into their processes. Read our 3 tips now!

item.title: VENOM Vulnerability: Community Patching and Mitigation Update
item.description: Find out more information on CrowdStrike's finding of VENOM Vulnerability on their blog here & learn more about community patching & mitigation updates.

item.title: Read Article "Venom Vulnerability Details" by Editorial Team
item.description: The CrowdStrike Intelligence Team’s primary focus is to track adversaries associated with nation-state actors and monitor their activity, learn more here!

item.title: Rhetoric Foreshadows Cyber Activity in the South China Sea - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Read up on how rhetoric foreshadows cyber activity in the South China Sea after conflict has risen amongst the PRC and U.S. on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Cloud-based Security: Future of the Industry? - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Alex Stamos, formerly with Yahoo & now CSO at Facebook, gave an interesting talk at AppSec California 2015 recently titled “AppSec is Eating Security.”
